programs.title: The Comeback
programs.desc: A television actress tries desperately to revive her career.

programs.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programs.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programs.title: Rooster
programs.desc: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

programs.title: The Comeback
programs.desc: A television actress tries desperately to revive her career.

programs.title: Puss in Boots
programs.desc: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

programs.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programs.desc: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.
